title: “My rights are very fundamentally important to me” – an interview with Sepideh Rahaa
content:
Sepideh Rahaa is a multidisciplinary artist and researcher who has been working in Finland for fourteen years. In an interview with Kuvasto, Rahaa talks about the importance of artists’ rights and why she turned down an offer related to the Venice Biennale.

(Suomenkielinen käännös artikkelista alempana.)

What do artists’ rights, copyright, and Kuvasto mean to you?

”My rights are very fundamentally important to me,” Sepideh Rahaa begins.

”For any visual artist – you can’t work as an artist and not care about these issues. Copyright is so important, because it also protects artists’ reputation and from reputational damage.”

”I have been a member of Kuvasto since 2023,” Rahaa says. ”I feel very happy because Kuvasto is supporting me ver
creator: Laura Hautsalo
